drl:
rule "R0"
when
    T2()
then
    insert(new T3("ab", true));
    insert(new T3("zz", false));
end
rule "R1"
when
    $p1_0 : T3($b1_0_0 : f0, $b1_0_1 : f1, f1 == false)
    T2(f0 >= "b", $b1_1_0 : f0)
    T3($b1_2_0 : f0, $b1_2_1 : f1)
then
    $p1_0.setF1(true);
    update($p1_0);
end
rule "R2"
no-loop
when
    $p2_0 : T1($b2_0_0 : f1)
then
    insert(new T3("alpha", $p2_0.isF0()));
end
rule "R3"
salience -7
when
    $p3_0 : T1($b3_0_0 : f2, $b3_0_1 : f2, f2 == false)
    T2(f0 != "ab")
then
    modify($p3_0) { setF2(true), setF0(true) }
end
